      have h3 : Tendsto (fun x => r * x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝[≠] 0) := by
        apply tendsto_nhdsWithin_of_tendsto_nhds_of_eventually_within
        · exact tendsto_nhdsWithin_of_tendsto_nhds (by continuity)
        · filter_upwards [self_mem_nhdsWithin] with x hx
          simp only [Set.mem_compl_iff, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
          exact mul_ne_zero hr hx
      exact h2.comp h3
    simp only [mul_one] at h1
    convert h1 using 1
    ext x
    by_cases hx : x = 0
    · simp [hx]
    · field_simp

simp only [hr, zero_mul, Real.sin_zero, zero_div]
    exact tendsto_const_nhds
  · have h1 : (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin (r * x) / x) = (fun x => r * (Real.sin (r * x) / (r * x))) := by
      ext x
      by_cases hx : x = 0
      · simp [hx]
      · field_simp
        ring
    rw [h1]
    have h2 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => r * x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝[≠] 0) := by
      apply tendsto_nhdsWithin_of_tendsto_nhds_of_eventually_within

    have h3 : Tendsto (fun y : ℝ => Real.sin y / y) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 1) := Real.tendsto_sin_div_self
    have h4 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin (r * x) / (r * x)) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 1) := h3.comp h2
    exact tendsto_const_nhds.mul h4 |>.congr (by simp)

simp [hr]
    · filter_upwards [self_mem_nhdsWithin] with x hx
      field_simp [hr, hx]
      ring
  refine Tendsto.congr' h ?_
  by_cases hr : r = 0
  · simp [hr]
  · refine Tendsto.mul tendsto_const_nhds ?_
    have := Real.tendsto_sin_div_self
    have key : Tendsto (fun x => r * x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝[≠] 0) := by
      refine tendsto_nhdsWithin_of_tendsto_nhds_of_eventually_within _ ?_ ?_
      · exact tendsto_const_nhds.mul tendsto_id
      · filter_upwards [self_mem_nhdsWithin] with x hx using mul_ne_zero hr hx
    exact this.comp key

    exact tendsto_const_nhds
  · have h1 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => r * (Real.sin (r * x) / (r * x))) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 (r * 1)) := by
      apply Tendsto.const_mul
      have h2 : Tendsto (fun y : ℝ => Real.sin y / y) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 1) := by
        have := Real.tendsto_sin_div_pow_one
        simp only [pow_one] at this
        exact this.mono_left nhdsWithin_le_nhds
      have h3 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => r * x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝[≠] 0) := by
        apply tendsto_nhdsWithin_of_tendsto_nhds_of_eventually_within
        · exact tendsto_const_nhds.mul tendsto_id |>.mono_left nhdsWithin_le_nhds
        · filter_upwards [self_mem_nhdsWithin] with x hx
          simp only [Set.mem_compl_iff, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hx ⊢
          exact mul_ne_zero hr hx
      exact h2.comp h3
    simp only [mul_one] at h1
    convert h1 using 1
    ext x
    by_cases hx : x = 0
    · simp [hx]
    · field_simp
